title: Communicate effectively in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Communicate effectively in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to communicate

pcs.text: Establish purpose of communication and identify required information1.2 Interpret and examine non-verbal information, as required1.3 Choose communication method to suit audience and purpose1.4 Prepare relevant information and prioritise in a logical manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish purpose of communication and identify required information1.2 Interpret and examine non-verbal information, as required1.3 Choose communication method to suit audience and purpose1.4 Prepare relevant information and prioritise in a logical manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish purpose of communication and identify required information1.2 Interpret and examine non-verbal information, as required1.3 Choose communication method to suit audience and purpose1.4 Prepare relevant information and prioritise in a logical manner.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to communicate

elements.title: Participate in routine verbal communication

pcs.text: Verbally exchange information using language, tone and pace suited to audience and purpose2.2 Use automotive terminology, including vehicle and component descriptions, accurately and according to industry conventions2.3 Conduct verbal exchanges with others in a courteous and professional manner, according to workplace communication protocols.2.4 Use active listening and questioning techniques to clarify and confirm understanding2.5 Clearly express own opinions and listen to the opinions of others without interruption
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verbally exchange information using language, tone and pace suited to audience and purpose2.2 Use automotive terminology, including vehicle and component descriptions, accurately and according to industry conventions2.3 Conduct verbal exchanges with others in a courteous and professional manner, according to workplace communication protocols.2.4 Use active listening and questioning techniques to clarify and confirm understanding2.5 Clearly express own opinions and listen to the opinions of others without interruption?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verbally exchange information using language, tone and pace suited to audience and purpose2.2 Use automotive terminology, including vehicle and component descriptions, accurately and according to industry conventions2.3 Conduct verbal exchanges with others in a courteous and professional manner, according to workplace communication protocols.2.4 Use active listening and questioning techniques to clarify and confirm understanding2.5 Clearly express own opinions and listen to the opinions of others without interruption.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Participate in routine verbal communication

elements.title: Carry out routine communications

pcs.text: Use written and other non-verbal communication techniques to convey accurate and factual information according to workplace communication protocols. 3.2 Clarify intended meaning with recipients3.3 Use workplace communication devices required for the task according to equipment specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use written and other non-verbal communication techniques to convey accurate and factual information according to workplace communication protocols. 3.2 Clarify intended meaning with recipients3.3 Use workplace communication devices required for the task according to equipment specifications and workplace procedures?

elements.title: Contribute to workplace communication

pcs.text: Respond to requests for information from colleagues in a timely manner4.2 Contribute to work group activities and meetings4.3 Clarify instructions from supervisor or colleagues 4.4 Seek feedback from supervisor or colleagues and incorporate into own communication
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Respond to requests for information from colleagues in a timely manner4.2 Contribute to work group activities and meetings4.3 Clarify instructions from supervisor or colleagues 4.4 Seek feedback from supervisor or colleagues and incorporate into own communication?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Respond to requests for information from colleagues in a timely manner4.2 Contribute to work group activities and meetings4.3 Clarify instructions from supervisor or colleagues 4.4 Seek feedback from supervisor or colleagues and incorporate into own communication.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
